preview_text:
The model favors Algeria at 38.5% to win, making them a modest statistical favorite. Austria's win probability stands at 30%, leaving a gap of roughly 8 percentage points between the two teams in the model's assessment.

The draw at 31.5% sits almost as a plausible middle outcome, narrowing the spread across all three results. The model sees this as a competitive match without a commanding favorite; Algeria edges ahead, but the distribution suggests genuine uncertainty and a material chance the sides leave level.

The model and market diverge meaningfully. Sportsbooks lean toward Austria (38.2%), inverting the model's ranking and opening a 7-point gap from the model's Algeria projection. Polymarket mirrors the sportsbook tilt. The dashboard does not adjudicate which source is correct; the disagreement warrants attention from those wagering.
